title: Trump lashes out at UK and France, telling allies 'the U.S.A. won't be there to help you anymore'
summary_full: Trump re-upped his disdain for European allies that have refused to take part in the U.S. and Israel's military operation against Iran.
summary_public: Trump re-upped his disdain for European allies that have refused to take part in the U.S. and Israel's military operation against Iran.
